turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling, you're through to refunds. My name's Jordan, how can I help?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me verify a couple things first. What name is the order under?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Of course, both the name and email are what you've got on file.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I was charged for something I cancelled before it shipped.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood. Give me a moment to look at what happened here.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I can see the return was received, looks like the refund just didn't trigger.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: So when will it actually land in my account?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I've waited long enough. Let me talk to your manager.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I get it, this has dragged on. Let me loop in my supervisor.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Refund's processed, you'll see it within a few business days. Anything else?
